heroBanner.title: Welcome to Datalyz
heroBanner.paragraph: Transforming raw data into actionable insights with cutting-edge tools for collection, analysis, and visualization.

hero.subtitle: Who collects your data online? Find out!

purpose.title: Manage all the data you collect
purpose.subtitle: Who is Datalyz suitable for?

users.title: Users
users.description: Our data management software enables complete automation, from data collection to analysis and visualisation.

associations.title: Associations
associations.description: You can choose whether or not to share which data with whom.

community.title: Community
community.description: Datalyz is open source to advance the field of research.

research.subtitle: We reached here with our hard work and dedication

filterData.description: Our platform provides powerful tools to help you filter, organize, and analyze your data effectively. With intuitive controls and advanced algorithms, you can extract meaningful insights from complex datasets while maintaining full control over your information.

testimonial.quote: Datalyz has completely transformed how we understand our data collection practices. The insights we've gained have been invaluable for our research, and the platform's ease of use made adoption seamless across our entire organization.
testimonial.author: John Doe

coreFeatures.title: Our Core Features
coreFeatures.description: Discover the tools that make Datalyz the ultimate solution for data analysis.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.description: Automate data scraping with our advanced tools to gather user data efficiently.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Analysis
dataAnalysis.description: Explore the inner workings of hyper-personalization algorithms with scientific precision.

dataVisualization.title: Data Visualization
dataVisualization.description: Gain precise insights into behavioral patterns with our intuitive visualization tools.

contentList.content1: At Datalyz, our ultimate goal is to contribute to the scientific community by publishing a research paper on hyper-personalization. We aim to uncover the mechanisms behind algorithmic personalization and provide actionable insights into how these systems influence user behavior.
contentList.content2: By combining advanced data collection, rigorous analysis, and intuitive visualization, we strive to push the boundaries of what's possible in understanding and optimizing hyper-personalized systems.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Transform Your Data?
ctaBanner.description: Join Datalyz today and unlock the full potential of your data.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: Meet the team behind Datalyz and their speciality.

process.title: Our 4-Step Process
process.description: A structured approach to transforming data into insights.

steps.title: Data Collection
steps.description: Automate the gathering of user data from multiple sources using our advanced scraping tools.

steps.title: Data Cleaning
steps.description: Ensure data quality by removing inconsistencies and preparing it for analysis.

steps.title: Data Analysis
steps.description: Apply scientific methods to uncover patterns and insights in the data.

steps.title: Visualization & Reporting
steps.description: Present findings through intuitive visualizations and detailed reports.

hero.title: Our Work
hero.subtitle: Developing innovative tools to help researchers understand hyper-personalization algorithms and their impact on user behavior.

goal.title: Our Mission
goal.description: Our project aims to create a comprehensive toolkit for researchers to analyze and understand how hyper-personalization algorithms work. By collecting and analyzing browsing data, we seek to predict and explain what these algorithms understand about users based on their online activity.

understand.title: Understand
understand.description: Decode how algorithms interpret your digital footprint

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.description: Process browsing data to reveal algorithmic patterns

publish.title: Publish
publish.description: Contribute to scientific research on personalization

hero.title: Get Involved
hero.subtitle: Join our research by contributing your browsing data. Your participation helps us understand how algorithms shape online experiences.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: We offer two methods to collect browsing data depending on your device type.

mobile.title: Mobile Tracking
mobile.description: For mobile devices, we use a VPN solution that captures your browsing activity while ensuring your privacy and security.

features.vpn: Secure VPN connection for data collection

desktop.title: Desktop Tracking
desktop.description: For desktop users, we provide a browser extension that collects your navigation data to analyze what algorithms understand from your browsing habits.

purpose.title: What We Do With Your Data
purpose.description: Your browsing data helps us understand how hyper-personalization algorithms work. We analyze patterns to predict what these algorithms infer about users based on their online behavior.
purpose.privacy: Your privacy is our priority. All data is anonymized and used solely for research purposes. We never sell or share personal information with third parties.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: A team of passionate students working on cutting-edge research in data science and algorithmic analysis.

project.title: Final Year Project
project.description: Datalyz is a final year project (4th and 5th year) at Epitech. Our goal is to conduct meaningful research on hyper-personalization algorithms and potentially publish a research paper if our findings prove significant.

research.title: Research Objective
research.description: We aim to uncover how hyper-personalization algorithms interpret user behavior. By analyzing browsing patterns, we hope to contribute valuable insights to the scientific community.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Four dedicated students with complementary skills working together to advance research in algorithmic personalization.

come.description: Specialized in large-scale data processing and analysis

mathieu.description: Expert in data infrastructure and pipeline development

cyprien.description: Focused on machine learning and algorithmic analysis

tom.description: Specialized in process optimization and performance tuning

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or want to work together? We'd love to hear from you!

alert.success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.

footer.description: We transform your data into actionable insights.

data.title: Share My Data with Datalyz
data.description: By sharing your general data with us, you help us understand your preferences and improve our analysis. This includes basic profile information and settings.
data.benefit: This allows us to build a baseline understanding of user behavior patterns.

navigation.title: Share My Navigation with Datalyz
navigation.description: Navigation data includes the pages you visit and the paths you take through our platform. This helps us optimize user flows and improve the overall experience.
navigation.benefit: We can identify which features are most valuable and improve navigation structure.

history.title: Share My History with Datalyz
history.description: Your browsing history on our platform helps us understand long-term usage patterns and preferences. This data is crucial for understanding how algorithms evolve their understanding over time.
history.benefit: Essential for studying how hyper-personalization algorithms build user profiles.

clicks.title: Share My Clicks with Datalyz
clicks.description: Click tracking allows us to see which elements you interact with. This micro-level data is vital for understanding precise user behavior and intent.
clicks.benefit: Reveals what catches user attention and drives engagement decisions.

scrolls.title: Share My Scrolls with Datalyz
scrolls.description: Scroll behavior indicates how you consume content - what you skip and what you read carefully. This is a strong signal of interest and engagement.
scrolls.benefit: Helps understand content consumption patterns and user engagement depth.

fullExperience.title: Share My Entire Web Experience with Datalyz
fullExperience.description: This comprehensive data collection includes all interactions, timing, mouse movements, and behavioral signals. It provides the complete picture needed for advanced algorithmic analysis.
fullExperience.benefit: Enables us to fully replicate and study hyper-personalization algorithms in action.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account and using Datalyz, you agree to these Terms of Service in full. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you must not use our platform. These terms apply to all users, regardless of their role (User, Scientist, Administrator).

description.title: 2. Description of the Project
description.content: Datalyz is a non-profit academic research project carried out by a student team as part of an Innovative Project (EIP). Its purpose is to study the mechanisms of hyper-personalization algorithms on the internet. No commercial activity is conducted through this platform. The project receives no revenue and does not pursue any commercial objective. The platform enables the collection of behavioral data — subject to your explicit and granular consent — to help researchers understand how recommendation systems build user profiles.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and all activities carried out under your account. You agree to provide accurate information, not to share your access with third parties, and to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

data.title: 4. Data Collection & GDPR
data.intro: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), all data collection on Datalyz is based on your free, specific, informed, and unambiguous consent. Upon registration, you are asked to individually consent to each type of data collection:
data.granular: Each consent is independent — you may accept some and decline others. This granular approach reflects our commitment to respecting your autonomy.
data.modify: You may modify your consent at any time from your Preferences page. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out prior to withdrawal.
data.noSale: Your data is never sold, transferred, or shared with third parties. It is used exclusively for academic research.

hosting.title: 5. Data Hosting
hosting.content: All data collected through Datalyz is hosted exclusively on servers located in France, within the European Union. This hosting complies with GDPR requirements regarding the transfer and storage of personal data.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

list.access: Right of access: obtain a copy of all data we hold about you
list.rectification: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
list.erasure: Right to erasure: request permanent deletion of your data
list.portability: Right to portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
list.opposition: Right to object: object to the processing of your data at any time
list.restriction: Right to restriction: request that processing be limited in certain cases

rights.exercise: To exercise these rights, delete your account from the settings page or contact us via the contact page. We will respond within 30 days.

use.title: 7. Acceptable Use
use.intro: You agree not to use the platform to:

list.scraping: Attempt to extract data by automated means (scraping, bots)
list.impersonation: Impersonate another person or create fictitious accounts
list.interference: Interfere with or damage the platform's infrastructure
list.illegal: Engage in any illegal activity or violate applicable regulations

ip.title: 8. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The platform, its design, code, and content are the property of the Datalyz project team. The research data collected — once anonymized — may be used for academic publications. No use of these elements is permitted without the prior written consent of the team.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: You may delete your account at any time from the account settings page. Upon deletion, all your personal data will be permanently and irreversibly erased within 30 days. We reserve the right to suspend any account that violates these terms.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.content: As an evolving research project, these terms may be updated. Any significant changes will be communicated to registered users by email at least 15 days before taking effect. Continued use of the platform following this notice constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms, or to exercise your rights, please contact us via the

privacyPolicy.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your personal data

collect.title: Data We Collect
collect.content: We collect data that you voluntarily provide (registration, preferences) as well as behavioral data on the platform, subject to your consent during onboarding. You can modify your consent at any time from your preferences.

use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.content: Your data is used exclusively for academic research on hyper-personalization algorithms. It is never sold to third parties and is processed in accordance with the GDPR.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. You can exercise these rights at any time from your account settings or by contacting us.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is retained for the duration of your account. When you delete your account, all associated data is permanently deleted within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding your personal data, you can contact us via the

cookiesPolicy.subtitle: Information about the cookies used on the Datalyz platform

what.title: What Are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our platform. They allow us to remember your preferences and ensure the proper functioning of the service.

manage.title: Managing Cookies
manage.content: You can configure your browser to refuse all cookies or to be notified when a cookie is sent. However, disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the platform.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions about our cookie policy, contact us via the

vpnInstallation.title: VPN Installation
vpnInstallation.subtitle: Connect securely to the Datalyz research network
vpnInstallation.whyVpn: The VPN allows you to access the Datalyz platform securely and ensures that your data collection is routed through our French servers, in compliance with GDPR.

launch.title: Launch Datalyz on your phone
launch.description: Open the Datalyz application on your mobile device and log in with your account.

choose.title: Choose your device type
choose.description: Select the operating system of your device: Windows, Apple (iOS/macOS) or Android.

download.title: Download the certificate
download.description: Click the button corresponding to your device. A secure link will be generated and the configuration file will download automatically.
